Section 714, R.S. § 2383, authorized extension of limits of towns established on unsurveyed lands.

Section 715, R.S. § 2384; 1946 Reorg. Plan No. 3, § 403, eff. , 11 F.R. 7876, , authorized Secretary of the Interior to survey and plat cities or towns on the public domain where interested parties fail to file transcript maps in twelve months after establishment.July 16, 194660 Stat. 1100
